name: profiler_agent
description: Data profiling specialist that samples Databricks tables, runs multi-layer PII detection (regex, Presidio NLP, LLM heuristic), and returns complete TableProfile objects with column statistics, null rates, cardinality, and distribution types.

skills.name: Profile Tables
skills.description: Sample and profile one or more Databricks tables, detecting PII columns and computing column statistics. Returns serialised TableProfile objects.
